title: Boom Enchantment
description: Adds a simple explosive enchantment with 3 power levels
body:
A lightweight and simple mod that adds an explosive **treasure** enchantment called Boom with 3 power levels.

## Examples
### Level 1
![Level 1 Explosion gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89202ceb026ae0785af1fc4c0c23759b6771bf79.gif)
